patches.summary: Check errors returned by http.NewRequestWithContext instead of discarding them.
patches.reason: Four sites used `req, _ := http.NewRequestWithContext(...)`, leaving req=nil on URL parse failure. The following Header.Set or Do(req) call would then panic. While the URLs are built from typed integers plus a constant base URL making failure unlikely in practice, the docID path in tnFetchDocumentText takes a server-supplied string that could theoretically produce an invalid URL.

patches.summary: Remove whereClause/args parameters from tnLoadNotices to eliminate latent SQL-injection surface.
patches.reason: The original generated signature accepted a raw whereClause string that was concatenated directly into the SQL query string. No caller ever passed a non-empty value (all 10 callers passed ""), so the capability was dead but the injection surface remained. Removed the parameters; all callers updated. Post-load filtering in Go already handles every caller's use case.
